scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:portable: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable --x64
scripts.dist:all: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:mac:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dir
scripts.dist:mac:universal: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.dist:mac:universal:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.release:mac:universal: node scripts/check-release-env.cjs mac && npm run dist:mac:universal
scripts.release:windows: node scripts/check-release-env.cjs windows && npm run dist:all
